---
name: Bug report
about: Report something in FolderDrop that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Screenshots or Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a short screen recording to help explain
the problem — especially useful for UI, drag-and-drop, or Quick Look issues.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g. macOS 14.5)
- **FolderDrop version:** (Settings → About)
- **Mac chip:** (Apple Silicon / Intel)

## Additional Context

Anything else that might be relevant — e.g. whether the affected folder is
on an external/network volume, whether it happens consistently or
intermittently, or console output if you have any.

---

Before submitting, please check [docs/roadmap.md](../../docs/roadmap.md#known-limitations)
(unbuilt features) and [docs/known-limitations.md](../../docs/known-limitations.md)
(known bugs in existing behavior) to confirm this isn't already documented.
